examples: When you want to get revenge on a woman you don't kill her--bosh!
Bosh blew by Garnett off the dribble and dunked the ball uncontested. Garnett, tired and beaten, could only watch Bosh's ascension from below.
"I didn't even know they handed out three flops, " Heat forward Chris Bosh said.
Chris Bosh crashed to the court clutching his right knee after a first-half collision.
